text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Brian, happy birthday! Hey, so what kinda present
do you want?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so there's nothing you want right now?
Okay then, we'll meet at the station tomorrow,
ten o'clock. We can go shopping for your present
together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You don't get to make plans for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, mind if I tag along then? I'll treat ya to lunch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, not you too, Ama... If you two wanna hang
out, just go by yours—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We could grab lunch at that new steak place!
From what I hear, the way they cook the meat, it
just gets juicier and juicier with each bite.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you looked like you really wanted to eat that
steak just now! ☆ That settles tomorrow's plans,
then. You copy?
